pr.title: Improve lifecycle test reliability
pr.body:
## Summary
- fix the background rules provider so storage invalidation starts a fresh rules load even when an older load is still in flight
- prevent stale in-flight loads from overwriting the refreshed cached rules
- add unit coverage for invalidation during concurrent rule loads

## Validation
- npm run playwright:install
- npm run check
- npx playwright test test/e2e/lifecycle.spec.ts -g "options filter lifecycle blocks, restores, and blocks again after re-enable|direct storage updates allow navigation after background rules are already primed|expired temporary filters do not prevent real navigation from being blocked" --repeat-each=10
pr.author: Copilot
